text.title: Freelancer Proposal Template Fixed-vs-T&M Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals onto a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Always evaluated before emitting the spec.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If predicates from AGENTS.md hold AND no Skip-If predicate fires?

conclusion.verdict: abort Freelancer Proposal Template Fixed-vs-T&M; emit wrong-tool note

branch.question: Are all required inputs opened with named source paths?

conclusion.verdict: stop; surface missing-input gap to operator

branch.question: Is a single named accountable owner identifiable from inputs?

conclusion.verdict: block output; require named owner before continuing

branch.question: Are stakes high (regulated scope, contract value > threshold, irreversible decision)?

conclusion.verdict: apply full Freelancer Proposal Template Fixed-vs-T&M; route synthesis to opus; require owner sign-off before downstream consumption
apply Freelancer Proposal Template Fixed-vs-T&M single-instance; route synthesis to sonnet; standard owner review

text.example: preconditions=true → inputs_available=true → owner_named=true → stakes=high → conclusion ref="r4".
